text: = \/ Layer 1 - Physical @ tsstesncain ©) savancanon Layer 1 (Physical) specifications define the transmission and reception of RAW BIT STREAMS between a device and a SHARED physical medium. It defines things like voltage levels, timing, rates, distances, modulation and connectors GAME GAME 010 1010101010 B g Binary 1 +1Volt Binary 0 -1Volt Physical Medium can be Copper (electrical), Fibre (light) or WIFI (RF)
